Title: Add flexible report filters and simplify session/upload handling

Summary:
- Simplifies login password handling and session creation.
- Adds an optional expression filter to reports.
- Saves uploads to disk before writing them to object storage.

Validation:
- Unit tests were not added yet.
- Manual smoke testing passed for a happy-path login, report export, and small file upload.

Reviewer focus:
- Security implications of the expression filter and upload handling.
- Authentication correctness and session expiration behavior.
- Error handling and boundary cases in the changed code.
